desc: A hardcore arcade gamer boy forms an intense rivalry and deep bond with a rich, silent girl over their shared love of 90s fighting games.
wiki: Haruo Yaguchi is obsessed with arcade games until he is repeatedly defeated by Akira Oono, a wealthy and silent classmate. Their rivalry blossoms into a profound friendship and eventually love, communicated almost entirely through their shared gaming experiences. Despite the massive gap in their social classes and Akira eventually having to move overseas, Haruo fights through emotional and physical obstacles to confess his love at the airport. She tearfully and happily accepts, cementing a beautiful and triumphant ending to their youth.

title: Cross Game
desc: Following a childhood tragedy, a boy and a girl bound by grief and their love for baseball work together to fulfill a shared dream and find love.
wiki: Kou Kitamura and Aoba Tsukishima are united by their connection to Wakaba, Aoba's older sister and Kou's childhood sweetheart, who passed away in an accident. Over the years, Kou trains relentlessly to become a star pitcher to fulfill Wakaba's final dream of seeing them at Koshien, while the tomboyish Aoba secretly coaches him. Their relationship evolves from bitter bickering to deep mutual understanding. In the triumphant finale, Kou fulfills the dream and explicitly confesses his love for Aoba, leading to a definitively happy and emotional romantic resolution.

title: Planetes
desc: Debris collectors in space navigate dangerous missions and existential crises, leading to a deeply mature romance that ends with a beautiful marriage.
wiki: Hachimaki is an ambitious space debris collector who dreams of owning his own spaceship, while his new partner, Tanabe, believes that love is the answer to everything. Their conflicting worldviews cause immense friction, but as they face the harsh, life-threatening realities of space, Hachimaki realizes his massive ambitions are empty without Tanabe. He overcomes severe psychological trauma and depression, ultimately proposing to Tanabe in a game of word chain. She happily accepts, and the series concludes with their joyous wedding.

title: Eureka Seven
desc: A bored teenager joins a rebel group of sky-surfers and falls fiercely in love with a mysterious girl, fighting against the world to protect her.
wiki: Renton Thurston's mundane life changes when a mecha crashes into his room, piloted by the beautiful and mysterious Eureka. Renton joins the rebel group Gekkostate to stay by her side. As they fight oppressive military forces, Renton's pure, unwavering love for Eureka helps her discover her own humanity and emotions. The massive, world-ending climax forces them to prove the strength of their bond. They succeed, carving a heart into the moon itself, and the series guarantees a legendary happy ending with them happily reunited.

title: The Pet Girl of Sakurasou
desc: A normal boy moves into a dorm for eccentric misfits and is tasked with caring for a brilliant but utterly helpless artist, sparking a deep and supportive romance.
wiki: Sorata Kanda is forced to live in the infamous Sakurasou dorm and is given the job of taking care of Mashiro Shiina, a world-class painter who cannot dress or feed herself. Sorata struggles with his own mediocrity compared to the geniuses around him, but Mashiro's absolute reliance on him and his growing desire to protect her push him to succeed. The light novel source material goes beyond the anime to secure a completely happy ending, showing Sorata and Mashiro officially becoming a couple and staying together for the rest of their lives.

title: Steins;Gate
desc: A self-proclaimed mad scientist invents a time machine and must repeatedly alter timelines to save the lives of his friends and the brilliant woman he loves.
wiki: Rintaro Okabe and his lab members accidentally invent a microwave that can send text messages to the past. This catches the attention of a sinister organization, leading to tragic consequences. Okabe must loop through time countless times to save his childhood friend Mayuri, but eventually realizes that saving her means letting the genius Kurisu Makise die. After enduring unimaginable psychological trauma, Okabe and Kurisu confess their love. Okabe successfully discovers a timeline where everyone survives, leading to an incredibly satisfying happy ending where he reunites with Kurisu.

title: Bakuman.
desc: Two high school boys strive to become top manga creators, driven by a promise that one of them will marry his crush once their manga gets an anime adaptation.
wiki: Moritaka Mashiro proposes to his crush, Miho Azuki, with a crazy condition: they will get married only after his manga gets an anime and she voices the heroine. They agree not to see each other until their dreams are fulfilled, communicating only via text. Over ten years, Mashiro and his writer partner Takagi face massive hurdles in the brutal manga industry. In the deeply emotional finale, their dreams finally align. Mashiro picks up Azuki in a fancy car, formally re-proposes, and they secure their promised happy marriage.

title: Inari, Konkon, Koi Iroha
desc: A clumsy girl is granted a sliver of divine power by a fox goddess, using it to help her friends and slowly win the heart of her middle school crush.
wiki: Inari Fushimi saves a fox pup and is granted shape-shifting powers by the goddess Uka-no-Mitama. While she uses the powers to try and get closer to her crush, Koji Tanbabashi, she realizes that genuine connection cannot be forced by magic. The story is an incredibly wholesome middle-school romance that develops naturally. Tanbabashi recognizes her genuine kindness and falls for the real Inari. The manga concludes with a wonderfully happy ending, jumping forward in time to show Inari and Tanbabashi officially married.

title: The Ancient Magus' Bride
desc: An abandoned girl is bought at an auction by an imposing skull-headed mage who declares her his apprentice and future bride, leading to profound mutual healing.
wiki: Chise Hatori, possessing rare magical abilities, sells herself into slavery because she has lost the will to live. She is purchased by Elias Ainsworth, a non-human mage. Elias gives her a warm home and teaches her magic, while Chise teaches the emotionally stunted Elias how to understand human empathy and love. Despite dark fantasy elements and perilous situations, their bond grows incredibly strong. The narrative solidifies their devotion, culminating in a beautiful makeshift wedding ceremony where they vow to stay together forever, guaranteeing their happy relationship.

title: Gosick
desc: A Japanese transfer student in Europe partners with a brilliant, doll-like girl locked in a library to solve mysteries, forming a bond that survives a world war.
wiki: Kazuya Kujo meets Victorique de Blois, a genius girl isolated by her cruel aristocratic father. Kujo becomes her only connection to the outside world, fiercely protecting her as they solve gruesome mysteries. As the onset of World War II tears them apart, Victorique is forced to flee her home, and Kujo is drafted into the military. The series delivers one of the most triumphant happy endings in anime: years later, after the war, they miraculously reunite, completely free from their pasts, and joyfully get married.

title: Eden of the East
desc: A girl is saved by an amnesiac boy holding a phone with billions in digital cash, pulling her into a deadly game to save Japan while they fall deeply in love.
wiki: Saki Morimi meets Akira Takizawa in Washington D.C. under bizarre circumstances. Takizawa is part of a survival game where twelve individuals are given massive funds to 'save' Japan, with the penalty of death if they fail. Saki trusts Takizawa completely and helps him unravel his past and outsmart the other competitors. Throughout the conspiracy, their romantic bond becomes unshakeable. The sequel movies wrap up the complex plot and provide a definitive, happy conclusion where Saki and Takizawa successfully reunite to face the future together.

title: Blast of Tempest
desc: Two friends seek revenge for a murdered sister by allying with a stranded sorceress, uncovering world-ending conspiracies and deeply satisfying romantic resolutions.
wiki: Mahiro Fuwa and Yoshino Takigawa use magic from the stranded Princess Hakaze to find Mahiro's sister's killer. The plot is heavily inspired by Shakespeare's 'The Tempest'. As Hakaze works with Yoshino, she falls hopelessly and genuinely in love with him. Yoshino eventually moves past his grief and reciprocates her feelings. By the end of the series, the world is saved, the tragic past is laid to rest, and the story concludes with a wonderfully happy ending where Yoshino and Hakaze are an official, highly affectionate couple.

title: Working!!
desc: The chaotic employees of a family restaurant navigate their bizarre quirks and incredibly slow-burn, hilarious crushes that ultimately pay off perfectly.
wiki: Souta Takanashi, a lover of small things, is recruited to work at Wagnaria. He is assigned to help Mahiru Inami, a girl with severe and violent androphobia. Through Souta's aggressive but patient exposure therapy, Mahiru completely overcomes her fear of men and falls deeply in love with him. Unlike many workplace comedies that reset the status quo, 'Working!!' provides a definitive climax in its final season. Souta realizes his own feelings, explicitly confesses to Mahiru, and they happily become an official couple.

title: Servant x Service
desc: Three quirky civil servants navigate the absurdities of their local government office, leading to a surprisingly sweet and successful workplace romance.
wiki: Lucy Yamagami works at the ward office to track down the official who approved her ridiculously long name. She works alongside the incredibly laid-back Yutaka Hasebe. While Hasebe seems like a slacker who constantly teases her, he proves to be highly competent and completely infatuated with Lucy. His relentless but respectful pursuit slowly chips away at her serious exterior. The series and its source material conclude with a happy ending, with Lucy finally accepting his feelings and the two establishing a joyful, official relationship.

title: Midori Days
desc: A fearsome delinquent wakes up to find his right hand has transformed into a miniature version of the girl who has a massive, secret crush on him.
wiki: Seiji Sawamura is a tough fighter who constantly gets rejected by girls. One day, his right hand inexplicably becomes Midori Kasugano, a girl who has loved him from afar for years. Her real body remains in a coma. As they literally live attached to each other, Seiji's tough exterior softens, and he genuinely falls in love with Midori's sweet, unwavering devotion. When Midori eventually wakes up in her real body and loses her memories of being his hand, Seiji tracks her down and confesses, securing a perfectly happy romantic ending.

title: Please Twins!
desc: A teenage programmer living alone is surprised when two girls move in, both possessing a photograph that suggests they might be his long-lost twin sister.
wiki: Maiku Kamishiro lives independently until Miina Miyafuji and Karen Onodera arrive, each claiming to be his twin based on a shared childhood photo. As they live together as a family, Maiku develops deep romantic feelings for one of them, creating severe anxiety over the possibility of incest. The dramatic tension is ultimately resolved happily when DNA tests prove which girl is the actual twin, freeing Maiku to explicitly confess his love to the unrelated girl, resulting in a sweet and definitive happy ending.

title: A Town Where You Live
desc: A boy travels from his rural hometown to Tokyo to chase after his sudden long-distance girlfriend, sparking a highly dramatic but ultimately successful lifelong romance.
wiki: Haruto Kirishima's life is turned upside down when Yuzuki Eba moves into his family's home from Tokyo. They fall in love, but Yuzuki abruptly returns to the city and cuts contact. Haruto transfers to a school in Tokyo to win her back. The story is notorious for its heavy drama, breakups, and complex love triangles. However, despite the immense frustration and hurdles, Haruto and Yuzuki's love for each other prevails. The manga ensures the ultimate happy ending, showing them reuniting, getting married, and having a child together.

title: Suzuka
desc: A relaxed high school boy moves to Tokyo and falls for his fiercely driven, track-and-field star neighbor, joining the track team to win her heart.
wiki: Yamato Akitsuki moves into his aunt's bathhouse and meets Suzuka Asahina, a highly disciplined high jumper who initially views him as a lazy slacker. To prove his worth and dedication, Yamato joins the track team and discovers a natural talent for sprinting. Their relationship is a rocky road of mismatched communication and sports drama. However, Yamato's persistent, genuine affection eventually breaks through Suzuka's grief over a past tragedy. The series concludes with a definitive happy ending: they stay together, get married, and raise their daughter, Fuuka.

title: A Silent Voice
desc: A former bully seeks redemption by learning sign language and reaching out to the deaf girl he tormented in elementary school, sparking profound healing and love.
wiki: Shoya Ishida is deeply depressed and suicidal after being ostracized for bullying Shoko Nishimiya, a deaf girl. Seeking to make amends before ending his life, he finds Shoko and apologizes. Their reunion kicks off a deeply emotional journey of forgiveness, self-acceptance, and psychological healing. As Shoya integrates back into society and saves Shoko from her own despair, their bond evolves into a deep, unspoken romance. The story concludes on a highly triumphant, happy note, with Shoya finally able to look the world in the eye, walking forward alongside Shoko.

title: B Gata H Kei
desc: A girl with wild ambitions to have 100 casual partners chooses a perfectly average boy for her first, accidentally falling deeply in love with him instead.
wiki: Yamada is a virgin with the absurd goal of casually sleeping with 100 men. She chooses the unassuming Takashi Kosuda as her easy first target. However, Yamada is incredibly awkward and completely inexperienced, leading to endless hilarious misunderstandings. As she tries to seduce Kosuda, she unexpectedly develops a massive, genuine crush on him, and abandons her wild ambitions entirely. The series drops the comedic facade for a genuinely sweet climax where they mutually confess their love, ensuring a happy, dedicated romantic ending.

title: Momokuri
desc: A girl who is obsessively infatuated with a younger boy successfully asks him out, leading to an incredibly sweet and slightly obsessive official relationship.
wiki: Yuki Kurihara is a massive stalker of Shinya Momotsuki (Momo), taking hundreds of hidden photos of him. She gathers her courage and confesses to him. Momo, who is inexperienced and eager to be seen as manly, accepts. Instead of dragging out the confession, the show focuses entirely on their established, highly affectionate relationship. While Kurihara tries to hide her extreme obsession, Momo simply adores her. The anime is a continuous stream of pure fluff, ending on a joyful and deeply happy note as they grow more comfortable together.

title: Tamako Love Story
desc: A clumsy mochi-maker's daughter is taken by surprise when her childhood friend confesses his love before moving away for college, forcing her to confront her true feelings.
wiki: Mochizou Ooji has been in love with his childhood friend Tamako Kitashirakawa for years, but she is completely oblivious, focused only on her family's mochi shop. As graduation approaches, Mochizou decides to study in Tokyo and finally musters the courage to confess to Tamako. Initially shocked and overwhelmed, Tamako struggles to process the change in their dynamic. However, with the encouragement of her friends, she realizes how much she truly needs him. The film concludes with a heartwarming and triumphant happy ending as she catches him at the bullet train station to enthusiastically return his feelings.

title: Insomniacs After School
desc: Two high schoolers suffering from severe insomnia find solace in their school's abandoned observatory, building a deep bond as they navigate sleepless nights together.
wiki: Ganta Nakami and Isaki Magari both suffer from chronic insomnia and accidentally discover they share a secret napping spot in the school's old astronomy club observatory. They revive the club to keep their sanctuary, bonding over nighttime photography and shared anxieties. As they spend their sleepless nights exploring the quiet town, their mutual support blossoms into a profoundly sweet, genuine romance. They confess their feelings and become a deeply devoted couple, finding peace and the ability to finally sleep peacefully when they are together.

title: Rainbow Days
desc: A hopeless romantic boy and his three eccentric best friends navigate the trials of high school crushes, pushing him to win the heart of a quiet, hardworking girl.
wiki: Natsuki Hashiba is a sweet but highly emotional boy who falls in love at first sight with Anna Kobayakawa when she offers him a tissue on Christmas. His best friends—the playboy Tomoya, the sadistic Keiichi, and the otaku Tsuyoshi—constantly interfere, tease, and support him in his pursuit. The story follows the romantic developments of all four boys. Natsuki slowly breaks through Anna's reserved exterior with his persistent, genuine kindness. The series delivers a wonderfully happy ending as Natsuki and Anna successfully confess their mutual feelings and start dating.

title: I Can't Understand What My Husband Is Saying
desc: A hardworking, normal office lady and her hardcore otaku husband navigate the hilarious and incredibly sweet realities of their married life.
wiki: Kaoru is an ordinary, hardworking woman who enjoys drinking, while her husband Hajime is an obsessed otaku who makes a living as a blogger. Despite having completely opposite interests and personalities, they love each other unconditionally. The short episodes follow their daily lives, highlighting the comedic misunderstandings caused by Hajime's anime references and Kaoru's normal perspective. Beyond the comedy, it is a heartwarming portrayal of a healthy, supportive marriage, cementing their happy trajectory when they joyfully discover they are expecting a child.
img: /static/I Can't Understand What My Husband Is Saying.jpeg

title: Love is Like a Cocktail
desc: A stern, professional office manager reveals her secret, incredibly affectionate side at home whenever her loving bartender husband mixes her a custom cocktail.
wiki: Chisato Mizusawa is an incredibly competent and serious department manager at her company, highly respected by all her subordinates. However, she has a secret: she loves alcohol but becomes incredibly cute and clingy when she gets drunk. Her husband, Sora, is a bartender who loves pampering her and creating delicious, custom cocktails for her when she gets home from a stressful day. The series is pure, stress-free fluff, entirely focused on a happily married couple showing their deep, unwavering love for each other in their cozy, private life.

title: Wise Man's Grandchild
desc: A reincarnated boy with devastating magical power falls in love with a gentle girl, forming a formidable power couple to defend their kingdom from demonic threats.
wiki: Shin Wolford is reincarnated with his past memories and raised by the legendary wizard Merlin, granting him immense magical power but zero common sense. When he enrolls in a magic academy, he instantly falls in love with the sweet and magically talented Sicily von Claude. Unlike typical fantasy series that drag out the romance, Shin quickly saves Sicily from an arrogant noble, and they confess their feelings early on. They officially become engaged halfway through the series, sharing an incredibly wholesome and devoted relationship while easily overpowering any villains who threaten their happiness.

title: A Lull in the Sea
desc: Childhood friends from an underwater village are forced to attend school on land, sparking a complex web of unrequited loves that spans across a mysterious five-year time skip.
wiki: Hikari, Manaka, Chisaki, and Kaname live in the sea village of Shioshishio. When their school closes, they must attend classes on the surface, where they meet a land-dwelling boy named Tsumugu. The story explores the severe prejudice between the sea and land people, heavily intertwined with a complicated polygon of teenage crushes. Following a magical catastrophe that freezes the sea village in time for five years, the characters must navigate adulthood and changed relationships. Despite the immense drama and heartbreak, the series resolves its romantic entanglements beautifully, guaranteeing a definitively happy ending for the main couples.

title: Kiznaiver
desc: Six teenagers with completely different personalities are forced into an experiment where they share each other's physical and emotional pain, leading to profound connections and romance.
wiki: Katsuhira Agata feels no pain, physical or emotional. He and his classmates are forcibly connected by the Kizna System, an experiment designed to bring world peace by forcing empathy. When one gets hurt, they all feel it. The experiment soon escalates to force them to share their deepest emotional pains, exposing their hidden crushes, jealousies, and traumas. The forced empathy breaks down their walls, leading to chaotic but genuine romantic developments. The series concludes with a highly satisfying happy ending, showing the group remaining close friends and the main romantic pairings happily resolving their feelings.

title: Kimikiss Pure Rouge
desc: The return of a childhood friend shakes up the quiet high school lives of two best friends, forcing them to navigate the complicated, sweet, and heartbreaking realities of finding true love.
wiki: Kouichi Sanada and Kazuki Aihara have their peaceful routines disrupted when their dynamic childhood friend, Mao Mizusawa, suddenly returns from France and moves into Kouichi's house. Based on a dating simulation game, the anime weaves together multiple distinct romantic plotlines. It explores the messy reality of teenage feelings, including miscommunications, unrequited crushes, and the courage required to confess. After a period of intense drama and personal growth, the story untangles its romantic webs to provide a clear, definitive, and deeply happy ending for both Kouichi and Kazuki with their respective true loves.

title: Nogizaka Haruka no Himitsu
desc: An ordinary boy discovers that the most beautiful, wealthy, and flawless girl in his school is secretly a massive hardcore otaku, promising to protect her secret.
wiki: Yuto Ayase is an incredibly average student who accidentally stumbles into the school library's secret room, discovering the idolized Haruka Nogizaka reading a rare anime magazine. Terrified of her elite family's reputation being ruined, she begs him not to tell. Yuto becomes her closest confidant and protector, allowing her to safely enjoy her hobbies. Their shared secret quickly blossoms into a genuine, incredibly pure romance. Overcoming the immense societal pressure and interference from her strict aristocratic family, Yuto proves his absolute devotion, culminating in a beautiful, legally binding happy marriage in the finale.

title: Ai Yori Aoshi
desc: A college student who severed ties with his abusive, wealthy family is reunited with his gentle childhood fiancée, choosing to build a loving home with her despite the obstacles.
wiki: Kaoru Hanabishi left his powerful clan to live a quiet life, but his world is upended when Aoi Sakuraba, his arranged fiancée from childhood, tracks him down. She has loved him her entire life and is determined to marry him, regardless of his family status. To appease her strict family, they live together in a massive summer house with a chaperone and other quirky female boarders, keeping their engagement a secret. The series focuses on their unwavering, incredibly mature devotion to one another, concluding with a triumphant happy ending where they formally secure their marriage against all odds.

title: Love Hina
desc: A chronic failing student becomes the manager of an all-girls dormitory while trying to keep a childhood promise to enter Tokyo University with his true love.
wiki: Keitaro Urashima has failed the Tokyo University entrance exams twice, driven by a fuzzy childhood promise to a girl he can barely remember. He is appointed manager of Hinata House, an all-girls dorm, where he constantly endures the comedic wrath of the eccentric residents, particularly the violent but sweet Naru Narusegawa. Despite the harem antics, Keitaro's heart remains dedicated. As he and Naru study together and bond, they realize they were the childhood friends who made the promise. The manga provides the ultimate happy ending, concluding with their beautiful wedding and the fulfillment of their university dreams.

title: Maison Ikkoku
desc: A struggling college student falls deeply in love with the beautiful young widow who manages his eccentric, chaotic boarding house, determined to prove himself worthy of her heart.
wiki: Yusaku Godai lives in the rundown Ikkoku boarding house, constantly tormented by his intrusive neighbors. His life changes when Kyoko Otonashi, a young widow still grieving her late husband, becomes the new manager. The series is a legendary, pioneering slow-burn romance. Over the course of several years, Godai matures from a flaky student into a responsible adult, weathering countless misunderstandings, rival suitors, and job failures to prove his absolute dedication to Kyoko. In a deeply emotional and highly satisfying climax, Kyoko accepts his love, and the series concludes with their happy marriage and the birth of their child.

title: InuYasha
desc: A modern-day schoolgirl falls down a well into feudal Japan, teaming up with a half-demon to gather shards of a magical jewel and forging an unbreakable romantic bond.
wiki: Kagome Higurashi is pulled into the past and shatters the Shikon Jewel. She forms a reluctant alliance with Inuyasha, a fiery half-demon who initially wants the jewel to become fully demonic. Their journey is fraught with dangerous battles against the evil Naraku. Inuyasha is torn between his lingering grief for his first love, Kikyo, and his growing, profound love for Kagome. Over the massive, epic series, Kagome's unconditional acceptance heals Inuyasha's heart. In the triumphant 'Final Act', they defeat Naraku. Kagome chooses to leave the modern world behind permanently to marry Inuyasha, securing a deeply satisfying, happily-ever-after.

title: Full Metal Panic!
desc: A hardened teenage mercenary with zero social skills goes undercover at a Japanese high school to protect a hot-headed girl with hidden, world-altering supernatural knowledge.
wiki: Sousuke Sagara, an elite soldier for the anti-terrorist organization Mithril, is assigned to protect Kaname Chidori. His military paranoia turns everyday high school situations into explosive comedic disasters, constantly angering the fierce but caring Kaname. When real threats emerge, Sousuke relies on his mecha piloting skills and Kaname's latent 'Whispered' abilities. Despite the intense warfare and traumatic events in the sequel series, their bond becomes unbreakable. Kaname explicitly declares she will wait for him, and the final light novel concludes with a wildly triumphant, definitive happy ending as they finally reunite and share a passionate kiss.

title: Date A Live
desc: To save the world from catastrophic 'spatial quakes' caused by incredibly powerful Spirits, an ordinary high school boy must date them and make them fall in love with him.
wiki: Shido Itsuka discovers that the massive disasters destroying cities are caused by beautiful, otherworldly girls known as Spirits. Instead of killing them, Shido's organization tasks him with sealing their powers by taking them on dates and making them fall completely in love with him, culminating in a kiss. While it functions as a massive harem comedy, Shido genuinely cares for the emotional well-being of every Spirit, especially Tohka, his primary love interest. The overarching light novel narrative rewards fans with a definitive, incredibly happy ending where Shido saves the Spirits permanently and solidifies his loving bonds.

title: We Never Learn: BOKUBEN
desc: A poor but hardworking student tutors three female geniuses in their weakest subjects to secure a scholarship, unintentionally causing all of them to fall deeply in love with him.
wiki: Nariyuki Yuiga must tutor Fumino (a literature genius terrible at math), Rizu (a math genius terrible at literature), and Uruka (a swimming prodigy terrible at everything academic) so they can pursue their dream careers. Through his tireless dedication to their success, Nariyuki inadvertently captures their hearts, along with a few other girls. Uniquely, the manga creator provided the ultimate happy ending for every single fan: the manga features completely separate, canon alternate timelines for every main girl. Each route concludes with a highly satisfying, definitive marriage or romantic commitment, ensuring 100% happiness regardless of preference.

title: Tayutama: Kiss on my Deity
desc: A boy accidentally breaks a seal, releasing ancient spirits and a beautiful goddess who immediately declares herself his wife, initiating a chaotic but loving supernatural cohabitation.
wiki: Yuri Mito accidentally unearths a relic that frees the Tayutai, mythical entities from Japanese folklore. The most powerful among them, the goddess Mashiro, takes the form of a beautiful girl and falls madly in love with Yuri, insisting they are husband and wife. She moves into his house, determined to learn how to be a perfect human bride while working alongside him to capture the rogue, dangerous Tayutai. The story weaves supernatural action with intense romantic devotion. It delivers a highly satisfying happy ending, with Yuri fully reciprocating her feelings and committing to their eternal, magical marriage.

title: Rec
desc: An advertising executive takes in a young, aspiring voice actress after her apartment burns down, sparking a secret, incredibly sweet cohabitation romance in the entertainment industry.
wiki: Fumihiko Matsumaru meets Aka Onda after a terrible day. When Aka's apartment burns down that night, Fumihiko impulsively invites her to live with him. They quickly start dating but must keep their relationship an absolute secret to protect Aka's blossoming career as a rookie voice actress. The short series beautifully captures the struggles of balancing professional ambitions with personal love. Despite misunderstandings and industry pressures, their deep trust prevails. The story concludes with a wonderful happy ending, solidifying their loving relationship as they continue to support each other's dreams.

title: Akaneiro ni Somaru Saka
desc: A boy with a rebellious past is forced into an arranged engagement with a transfer student, navigating intense school rivalries and complicated family feelings to find true love.
wiki: Junichi Nagase, known for his delinquent middle-school days, saves a girl named Yuuhi Katagiri, only to discover she is his wealthy, arranged fiancée. She transfers to his school and moves into his house. While initially clashing due to their opposite personalities, they slowly develop a deep, genuine affection. The anime adaptation is infamous for pulling a massive plot twist in the finale, deviating from the expected arranged-marriage trope to have Junichi fully confess and commit to his fiercely loyal younger sister, Minatsu, securing a definitive, albeit controversial, happy ending for their specific romantic route.

title: Love, Election and Chocolate
desc: To save their food research club from being disbanded, a boy runs for student council president, unraveling school conspiracies while navigating a deeply emotional love triangle.
wiki: Yuki Ojima decides to run for student council president to protect the Food Research Club's funding. His campaign exposes massive corruption and financial secrets within the elite academy's administration. Amidst the political drama, Yuki is caught in a complex emotional web with his fiercely protective childhood friend, Chisato, and other supportive girls in his club. Yuki helps Chisato overcome her severe trauma regarding chocolate and past loss. The anime firmly resolves the romantic tension, providing a clear, happy ending where Yuki officially chooses Chisato, and they successfully save their club while becoming a devoted couple.

title: And You Thought There Is Never a Girl Online?
desc: An otaku boy discovers that his in-game wife is actually a beautiful girl from his school who cannot distinguish between the online game and real-life romance.
wiki: Hideki Nishimura swore off online marriages after being rejected by an older male player playing a female avatar. Years later, he reluctantly accepts an in-game proposal from a persistent healer named Ako. To his shock, his entire guild is revealed to be girls from his high school, and Ako is a stunning, socially awkward beauty. Ako genuinely believes she and Hideki are married in real life. Hideki and his friends form the 'Net Gaming Club' to help Ako distinguish reality from the game. Ultimately, Hideki falls deeply in love with the real Ako, officially reciprocating her feelings for a happy, wholesome ending.
img: /static/And You Thought There Is Never a Girl Online?.jpeg

title: Clannad: After Story
desc: A young couple faces the beautiful and incredibly harsh realities of adulthood, navigating profound tragedy before a supernatural miracle restores their ultimate happy ending.
wiki: Tomoya Okazaki and Nagisa Furukawa graduate high school, get married, and prepare to start a family. The story takes a notoriously heartbreaking turn when Nagisa dies in childbirth, and their daughter Ushio later succumbs to the same illness. However, Tomoya's selfless actions throughout the series collected 'orbs of light'. In the breathtaking finale, this magic resets time, granting a miraculous 100% happy ending where Nagisa survives, and they live joyfully together as a complete, loving family.

title: Beyond the Boundary
desc: An immortal half-demon boy falls in love with a clumsy Spirit World warrior whose cursed blood is the only thing that can kill him, fighting fate to stay together.
wiki: Akihito Kanbara is immortal and obsessed with girls in glasses, making him instantly drawn to Mirai Kuriyama, a Spirit Warrior who uses her blood as a weapon. They are tasked with fighting a world-ending monster known as the 'Beyond the Boundary', which resides inside Akihito. Mirai sacrifices her own life to save him, but Akihito refuses to accept a world without her. In the concluding movie, 'I'll Be Here', they overcome amnesia and magical trauma to reunite, culminating in a beautiful mutual confession and a definitive happy ending.

title: Fushigi Yugi
desc: A middle school girl is pulled into an ancient Chinese book to become a priestess, falling passionately in love with one of her magical celestial warriors.
wiki: Miaka Yuki is transported into 'The Universe of the Four Gods' and tasked with gathering seven Celestial Warriors to summon the beast Suzaku. She falls deeply in love with her protector, Tamahome. Their romance is filled with intense drama, betrayal, and heartbreak as they fight against rival nations and dark magic. Despite the overwhelming odds against a human and an illusionary book character being together, Tamahome's soul is reincarnated into the real world as Taka. He finds Miaka, and they share a wonderfully triumphant, happy marriage.

title: Actually, I am...
desc: A boy who cannot keep a secret discovers his massive crush is actually a vampire, kicking off a chaotic high school life where he must protect her identity at all costs.
wiki: Asahi Kuromine is infamous for his inability to lie, earning him the nickname 'a leaky basket'. He stays after school to confess to Youko Shiragami, only to discover she has bat wings and is a vampire. To prevent her from having to drop out and move away, Asahi vows to keep her secret. Their relationship is incredibly wholesome and sweet amidst the escalating supernatural chaos of aliens and werewolves. The manga concludes with a highly satisfying happy ending where Asahi successfully confesses, they officially date, and remain happily together into the future.

title: Science Fell in Love, So I Tried to Prove It
desc: Two brilliant but socially inept scientists develop feelings for each other and dedicate their lab's resources to mathematically proving that their love is real.
wiki: Shinya Yukimura and Ayame Himuro are STEM researchers who mutually confess they might be in love. However, being scientists, they refuse to act on it until they can empirically quantify their affection through heart rate monitors, mood tracking, and absurd experiments. Instead of a frustrating 'will-they-won't-they', the show confirms their mutual attraction immediately and explores their relationship through a comedic, academic lens. Their experiments ultimately prove their deep bond, culminating in a highly romantic, official kiss that secures their happy ending.
img: /static/Science Fell in Love, So I Tried to Prove It.jpeg

title: When Will Ayumu Make His Move?
desc: A stoic boy joins the shogi club to be close to his upperclassman crush, vowing to confess his feelings only after he can finally defeat her in a match.
wiki: Ayumu Tanaka is a beginner at shogi but has a massive crush on the club president, Urushi Yaotome. Ayumu constantly makes incredibly direct, romantic compliments with a completely straight face, leaving Urushi severely flustered as she tries to get him to admit he likes her. However, Ayumu stubbornly refuses to formally confess until he beats her in a game. The series provides an adorable, stress-free slow burn that guarantees a happy ending, with the manga concluding with Ayumu achieving his goal, confessing, and the two happily starting their official relationship.

title: Aharen-san wa Hakarenai
desc: A boy with a scary face befriends his tiny, quiet desk neighbor who has absolutely no sense of personal space, leading to an incredibly sweet and funny dynamic.
wiki: Matsuboshi Raido looks intimidating but is actually very kind and highly imaginative. He befriends Reina Aharen, a girl who speaks so softly he has to lean in close to hear her. Because she struggles with social boundaries, she frequently clings to him, feeds him, and falls asleep on him. Raido fully embraces her quirks. They become completely inseparable. The series moves past its comedic premise to deliver a genuinely wonderful romantic conclusion, with the two openly confessing their feelings and officially becoming a highly devoted, happy couple.

title: Doctor Elise: The Royal Lady with the Lamp
desc: A wicked queen is executed, reincarnates as a modern surgeon, and then returns to her original life, using her medical genius to save lives and win the heart of her former enemy.
wiki: Elise de Clorance lived her first life as a tyrant and was executed by her fiancé, Prince Linden. After dying in a plane crash in her second life as a brilliant surgeon, she wakes up back in her first life before her marriage. Determined to atone, she cancels her engagement and uses her modern medical knowledge to stop plagues and heal the wounded. Prince Linden, who previously despised her, falls deeply in love with her new, compassionate self. Elise successfully changes her tragic fate, resulting in a beautiful, happy marriage to Linden.
img: /static/Doctor Elise_ The Royal Lady with the Lamp.jpeg

title: Summer Time Rendering
desc: A boy returns to his island hometown for the funeral of his childhood friend, uncovering a deadly supernatural conspiracy and using time-loop powers to save her.
wiki: Shinpei Ajiro discovers that his childhood friend and crush, Ushio Kofune, was murdered by supernatural 'Shadows' that are replacing the islanders. Shinpei gains the ability to loop back in time whenever he dies. He partners with a Shadow clone of Ushio, who retains her real memories and love for him. Through immense sacrifice and brutal battles, Shinpei and Ushio successfully eradicate the core Shadow entity. This rewrites the timeline entirely, creating a perfect happy ending where the tragedy never occurred, Ushio is alive, and they happily reunite.

title: 86 EIGHTY-SIX
desc: An elite military handler forms a profound emotional bond with a squadron of discarded child soldiers, fighting against impossible odds to save them and stand by their side.
wiki: Vladilena Milizé commands the '86', a deeply oppressed minority forced to pilot mechas in a deadly war. She communicates with their battlefield leader, Shin Nouzen, through an audio synchronization device. Despite never meeting face-to-face, they develop a profound, lifesaving bond built on absolute mutual respect and growing love. Shin believes he is destined to die on the battlefield, but Lena promises to catch up to him. The anime culminates in one of the most breathtakingly emotional, happy reunions in history, where Lena and Shin finally meet in person, securing a hopeful and romantic future together.

title: Cardcaptor Sakura
desc: A young girl accidentally releases a deck of magical cards and must recapture them, turning her bitter rivalry with a martial arts prodigy into a legendary, sweet romance.
wiki: Sakura Kinomoto becomes the Cardcaptor to seal the Clow Cards. She frequently clashes with Syaoran Li, a descendant of the cards' creator who wants them for himself. Syaoran initially treats Sakura with hostility, but as they face magical dangers together, his respect for her immense kindness turns into a massive, undeniable crush. The slow-burn progression from rivals to friends to lovers is beautifully executed. The series secures an iconic happy ending with Syaoran confessing his love and giving Sakura a handmade bear, leading to a joyful reunion when he permanently moves to Japan to be with her.

title: Sailor Moon
desc: A clumsy teenager discovers she is the reincarnated princess of the moon, teaming up with a mysterious masked hero who is destined to be her eternal true love.
wiki: Usagi Tsukino transforms into Sailor Moon to fight evil, often saved by the enigmatic Tuxedo Mask (Mamoru Chiba). While they bicker constantly in their civilian lives, they uncover their tragic past: they were Princess Serenity and Prince Endymion, lovers whose kingdom was destroyed. Reunited in the present, they vow to protect Earth and each other. Their romance is central to the entire franchise. Despite facing numerous deaths and resurrections, the story culminates in the ultimate happy ending where they get legally married and peacefully rule Crystal Tokyo together with their daughter, Chibiusa.

title: Kamikaze Kaitou Jeanne
desc: The reincarnation of Joan of Arc operates as an art thief to seal demons, forming a complicated romance with a rival phantom thief who wants to steal her heart.
wiki: Maron Kusakabe transforms into Kaitou Jeanne to steal paintings possessed by demons. She is constantly thwarted by Kaitou Sinbad (Chiaki Nagoya), who initially intends to manipulate her but ends up falling fiercely in love with her. Chiaki's unwavering support helps Maron overcome her deep feelings of abandonment and the manipulative lies of the angels. The manga provides a definitive and highly satisfying happy ending, flashing forward to show Maron and Chiaki happily married and raising their reincarnated friends as their children.

title: Full Moon wo Sagashite
desc: A 12-year-old girl with throat cancer is given one year to live, using magical powers granted by two reapers to become a pop idol and fulfill a promise to her childhood love.
wiki: Mitsuki Koyama dreams of becoming a singer to reach her crush, Eichi, in America. Two shinigami, Takuto and Meroko, allow her to transform into a healthy 16-year-old idol named Full Moon. As the year progresses, Mitsuki discovers Eichi actually died in a plane crash long ago. Devastated, it is Takuto's growing, protective love that gives her a new reason to live. In a remarkably beautiful and triumphant happy ending, Mitsuki survives her surgery, and Takuto is given a second chance at life, reincarnating as a human to happily reunite with her.

title: In Another World With My Smartphone
desc: After God accidentally strikes a boy with lightning, he resurrects him in a fantasy world with enhanced stats and his smartphone, leading to overpowered adventures and multiple joyous engagements.
wiki: Touya Mochizuki is reborn in a magic world and quickly accumulates immense power and a large group of beautiful, highly capable female companions. Unlike most harem series that drag out the romance or force the protagonist to choose only one, this series embraces the polygamy trope completely and happily. The girls mutually agree to share him, and Touya officially accepts their feelings. The light novels guarantee the ultimate happy ending for all involved, culminating in Touya marrying all nine of his devoted fiancées and living a stress-free, luxurious life.

title: Strike the Blood
desc: A high school boy inherits the powers of the world's strongest vampire, requiring him to drink the blood of his beautiful female observers to unleash his true abilities and save the city.
wiki: Kojou Akatsuki becomes the Fourth Progenitor and is watched by Yukina Himeragi, an attack mage armed with a sacred spear. As terrorist threats attack their artificial island, Kojou must feed on Yukina (and eventually other girls) to activate his familiar beasts. The phrase 'No, senpai, this is our fight!' becomes their romantic battle cry. The extensive OVA series faithfully adapts the entire light novel run, concluding with a highly satisfying happy harem ending where Kojou officially marries Yukina and the others, and a flash-forward shows them happily raising their children.

title: Shugo Chara!
desc: A girl perceived as 'cool and spicy' wishes for the courage to be her true self, hatching three magical guardian characters who help her fight an evil corporation and find true love.
wiki: Amu Hinamori uses her Guardian Characters to purify corrupted 'X Eggs'. She is caught in a love triangle between the princely Tadase and the rebellious, teasing Ikuto Tsukiyomi. While Ikuto operates on the enemy's side to protect his family, he is fiercely dedicated to Amu's safety. Amu helps Ikuto break free from his traumatic family control. The manga decisively resolves the romance in Ikuto's favor. He confesses his love, promises to return for her when she is older, and they share a definitive, happy kiss, securing their future together.

title: Tokyo Mew Mew
desc: Five girls infused with the DNA of endangered animals must protect Earth from aliens, while their leader desperately tries to hide her cat ears from her massive school crush.
wiki: Ichigo Momomiya is infused with Iriomote cat DNA, transforming her into Mew Ichigo. She is deeply in love with Masaya Aoyama, a popular boy who loves the environment. Ichigo's dual life causes intense romantic drama, especially when the alien leader Kisshu also falls aggressively in love with her. In a massive twist, Aoyama is revealed to be the enigmatic Blue Knight, and subsequently the final boss, Deep Blue. Ichigo's pure love purifies him, resulting in a perfectly happy ending where they save the world, stay together, and share a triumphant kiss.

title: Tearmoon Empire
desc: A selfish princess is executed via guillotine and wakes up as her 12-year-old self, using her diary of the future to desperately avoid her grisly fate and accidentally becoming a revered saint.
wiki: Princess Mia Luna Tearmoon realizes that to avoid the guillotine, she must fix her failing empire. Driven entirely by cowardice and a desire for comfortable sweets, her frantic, self-serving actions are constantly misinterpreted by everyone around her as acts of profound wisdom and benevolence. She seeks an alliance with Prince Abel Remno, who previously ignored her. Her new, 'caring' persona causes Abel to fall deeply and genuinely in love with her. Mia succeeds in rewriting history, avoiding her execution, and securing a wonderfully happy romantic engagement to Abel.

title: Outbreak Company
desc: A hardcore otaku is kidnapped by the Japanese government and sent to a fantasy world to spread anime and manga culture, falling in love with his half-elf maid in the process.
wiki: Shinichi Kanou is tasked with bringing otaku culture to the Holy Eldant Empire. He is assigned a half-elf maid named Myucel Foaran, who is heavily discriminated against in her world due to her mixed blood. Shinichi treats her with absolute kindness and respect, teaching her how to read manga and treating her as an equal. Myucel falls deeply in love with him, and Shinichi risks his life to protect her from societal prejudice and political assassination. The story is a heartwarming tale of acceptance that guarantees a happy, devoted ending for the two of them.

title: Amagi Brilliant Park
desc: An arrogant, narcissistic high school boy is forced at gunpoint to manage a failing, magical amusement park to save its inhabitants and their cursed princess from vanishing entirely.
wiki: Seiya Kanie is recruited by Isuzu Sento to save Amagi Brilliant Park, which must hit a massive attendance goal in three months or be closed down. The park is staffed by magical beings from Maple Land, and Princess Latifa is cursed to lose her memory and life force if the park fails. Seiya's brilliant business acumen and Isuzu's violent enforcement work perfectly together. The anime concludes with a triumphant happy ending: they hit the attendance goal, the magical energy cures Latifa's curse entirely, and Seiya chooses to stay at the park, hinting at a happy romantic future.

title: Arakawa Under the Bridge
desc: An elite corporate heir is saved from drowning by a homeless girl who claims to be an alien from Venus, forcing him to live under a bridge and be her boyfriend to repay his life debt.
wiki: Kou Ichinomiya's strict family policy is to never be indebted to anyone. When Nino saves his life, he has no choice but to accept her request to be her lover. Kou moves into the bizarre community living under the Arakawa bridge, abandoning his wealthy lifestyle. Despite the extreme comedy and absurd characters, Kou's relationship with Nino becomes incredibly genuine. He drops his corporate obsession and truly falls in love with her innocent, caring nature. The story provides a definitive, happy conclusion where they stay together, fully embracing their quirky, loving life.

title: Sacrificial Princess and the King of Beasts
desc: A human girl offered as a sacrifice to the terrifying King of Beasts discovers his secret, kind-hearted nature, becoming his queen and bridging the gap between humans and monsters.
wiki: Sariphi is the 99th female human sacrifice offered to the King of the Beasts and Demons. However, instead of fearing him, she discovers that he is actually a half-human who is kind and gentle. The King, Leonhart, refuses to eat her and instead declares her as his Queen. Despite massive political opposition from the demon nobility who despise humans, Sariphi's unwavering bravery and deep love for Leonhart win them over. The series culminates in a wonderfully happy ending where they successfully bring peace between the human and demon realms, and are shown happily raising their child together.
img: /static/Sacrificial Princess and the King of Beasts.jpeg

title: I'm Giving the Disgraced Noble Lady I Rescued a Crash Course in Naughtiness
desc: A feared misanthropic sorcerer rescues an abused noblewoman, dedicating his life and immense wealth to spoiling her rotten and teaching her how to enjoy life's pleasures.
wiki: Allen Crawford, known as the 'Demon Lord' due to his antisocial behavior and immense magical power, finds Charlotte Evans collapsed in the woods after her engagement was falsely annulled. Realizing she has been abused and exploited her entire life, Allen decides to employ her and teach her 'naughty' things—which to him simply means staying up late, eating sweets, and having fun. His constant pampering heals Charlotte's deep emotional scars. They fall deeply in love, with Allen fiercely protecting her from her toxic family, securing a perfectly wholesome, happy relationship.
img: /static/Im Giving the Disgraced Noble Lady I Rescued.jpeg

title: Love After World Domination
desc: The leader of a sentai hero squad and the combat princess of the evil villain organization fall in love, sneaking away during battles to go on incredibly sweet, secret dates.
wiki: Fudo Aikawa is the Red Gelato, the leader of the hero squad Gelato 5. Desumi Magahara is the Reaper Princess, a high-ranking combatant of the evil organization Gekko. While they are supposed to be mortal enemies, they are actually desperately in love with each other. They use their massive, flashy battlefield clashes as a cover to sneak off and take pictures, hold hands, and share romantic moments. The series is pure, unadulterated fluff, portraying a highly communicative and deeply affectionate couple overcoming the hilarious hurdle of being on opposing sides of a superhero war.

title: My Senpai is Annoying
desc: A tiny, hardworking saleswoman is constantly annoyed by her massive, boisterous senior colleague, but slowly realizes his teasing is rooted in deep, unwavering support and affection.
wiki: Futaba Igarashi is a short, dedicated office worker who is frequently treated like a child by her large and loud senpai, Harumi Takeda. While she complains about his overbearing nature, Takeda is incredibly reliable and always has her back in professional and personal crises. As they spend more time together both in and out of the office, Futaba's annoyance gradually transforms into a massive, undeniable crush. The lighthearted workplace comedy focuses on their incredibly supportive dynamic, steadily marching toward a joyful, romantic commitment.

title: Uzaki-chan Wants to Hang Out!
desc: A quiet, introverted college student has his peaceful life constantly disrupted by his energetic underclassman, whose relentless teasing slowly chips away at his walls to form a deep romantic bond.
wiki: Shinichi Sakurai just wants to play video games in peace, but his boisterous underclassman, Hana Uzaki, believes he is lonely and makes it her mission to drag him out of the house. While her constant teasing and chaotic energy initially irritate him, Sakurai grows deeply accustomed to her presence. Their college friends and Uzaki's family constantly observe their obvious chemistry. The manga explicitly delivers on the romantic buildup, with the two eventually confirming their mutual feelings, confessing, and happily officially dating.

title: Don't Toy with Me, Miss Nagatoro
desc: A timid aspiring artist is relentlessly teased by an athletic underclassman, a dynamic that gradually transforms from bullying into a fierce, protective, and deeply genuine romance.
wiki: Naoto Hachioji (Senpai) is a massive pushover until he catches the eye of Hayase Nagatoro, who mercilessly teases him about his manga and his timid nature. However, it quickly becomes clear that Nagatoro's teasing is a harsh cover for her massive crush, and she becomes fiercely defensive if anyone else tries to bully him. Through her aggressive encouragement, Senpai gains immense self-confidence and artistic motivation. The manga concludes with a highly satisfying, definitive happy ending where Senpai proves his growth, confidently confesses his love, and they share a joyful, official kiss.

title: The Foolish Angel Dances with the Devil
desc: A demon infiltrates a human high school to recruit allies, only to accidentally target a disguised angel who forces him into a chaotic, hilarious, and ultimately loving partnership.
wiki: Masatora Akutsu travels to Earth to find charismatic humans to help the demons fight the angels. He immediately tries to recruit Lily Amane, the beautiful transfer student, completely unaware that she is actually a ruthless angel sent to hunt demons. Lily quickly defeats him and forces him to be her servant. What begins as a bitter rivalry filled with comedic attempts to corrupt or convert each other quickly evolves into genuine mutual affection. They protect each other from their respective supernatural factions, establishing a wonderfully sweet, stress-free romance.
img: /static/The Foolish Angel Dances with the Devil.jpeg

title: Tales of Wedding Rings
desc: A normal boy follows his childhood crush into a magical world, discovering she is a princess and that he must marry her—and four other princesses—to save the realm.
wiki: Haruto Satou has been in love with his neighbor Hime since childhood. When she suddenly returns to her home dimension, he follows her, arriving just in time to crash her arranged wedding. He kisses her, inadvertently sealing a magical contract that makes him the Ring King. To defeat the Abyssal King, Haruto must travel the world and marry the princesses of the other realms to acquire their rings. Unlike typical harems, Haruto is deeply devoted to Hime, but as he forms genuine, loving bonds with all his wives, the series points toward a victorious, completely happy polygamous ending.
